economic_notes: Crow Lake Gas & Convenience Ltd. operates a gas bar and convenience store. Economic Development Inc. and Economic Development LP are consolidated. Kakagi Lake Enterprises LP and 1833389 Ontario Inc. accounted for by modified equity method.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - basis for qualification is that the consolidated statement of operations does not present a comparison with originally planned budget amounts, which is a departure from Canadian public sector accounting standards. Prior year 2020 included a $7,214,552 Windy Point claim settlement (one-time item) which inflated prior year revenue and surplus. The accumulated surplus on the balance sheet ($25,255,205) includes accumulated remeasurement gains of $632,720, while the statement of changes in accumulated surplus shows $24,535,411; the difference represents remeasurement gains. Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Two entities (Kakagi Lake Enterprises LP and 1833389 Ontario Inc.) are accounted for by modified equity method and not fully consolidated. enterprises_expenses estimated as sum of Economic Development + OFNLP Casino Rama + Economic Development Inc + Economic Development LP + Crow Lake Gas segments.
